_comment: This is the event shape n8n's Slack Trigger emits, already unwrapped from Slack's event_callback envelope. When testing the workflow manually, replace REPLACE_WITH_TEST_CHANNEL_ID and REPLACE_WITH_REAL_MESSAGE_TS with real values.
text: <@U9999999999> can you dive deeper into the Lambda function operations? I feel like there is more to see there.
